item.title: Its not about respect for life, its about respect for life that they care about
item.description:
Its not about respect for life, its about respect for life that they care about. Politness is a tool of those in power to sideline dissent. #uhc #recentevents #unitedhealthcare #forgeinpolicy

item.title: Social pressure is often a real inhibitor of people making different equal economic choices and we cannot just lay down when we ...
item.description:
Social pressure is often a real inhibitor of people making different equal economic choices and we cannot just lay down when we observe the empire using social pressure to push people into doing harmful things #greenscreenvideo
